markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members and provide context on team structure, workflows, and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires (Nicolas and Oluwatimilehin) joining GrowthX.ai team; Timilehin transitioning from freelancer to full-time](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Team using Circle for training, Fathom for call recordings, and moving away from Airtable/Airrops to custom-built solutions](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Team structure involves pods led by managing editors, with managing directors overseeing multiple pods](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Emphasis on leveraging AI workflows and iterative improvement of content processes](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

## Topics

### Team Onboarding and Access

  - [New hires to complete onboarding checklist in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Access provided to Circle (training platform), Fathom (call recordings), and 1Password (shared logins)](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [AI SEO workshop (4 hours long) available but not mandatory to watch in full](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Encouragement to explore client instances in Client OS for context](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

### Team Structure and Dynamics

  - [Pods typically led by a managing editor, overseeing \~5 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Managing directors oversee 2-3 pods](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Account managers focus on workflows and iterative improvements](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Writers involved for editing, expanding content, and refining workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Workflow and Tool Changes

  - [Moving away from Airtable and Airrops due to scalability and cost issues](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Developing custom "Content OS" solution to replace Airtable functionality](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Aim to automate more processes, especially for high-volume content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Role-Specific Updates

  - [Timilehin: Transitioning to full-time, likely to formalize work with Jess and Sarah's pod](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Nicolas: To be onboarded by David (managing editor) and Jacob (managing director)](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Both encouraged to explore client contexts in Client OS database](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nicolas and Timilehin to complete onboarding tasks and review training materials in Circle](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Timilehin to discuss potential involvement in Tribe project with Jess](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Both to explore client contexts in Client OS for deeper understanding of accounts](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Follow up with Seth for any 1Password access issues](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Attend scheduled onboarding session on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Reach out to Kyle for any additional questions or clarifications needed](https://fathom.video/share/wU9xajyxcqSLxkMKFxKs22RXyP7tjQJa?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
